sn22.139:1.2: “Monks, whatever is inconstant, you should abandon desire-passion there.
sn22.139:1.4: “Form, monks, is inconstant. You should abandon desire-passion there.
sn22.139:1.5: “Feeling is inconstant. You should abandon desire-passion there.
sn22.139:1.6: “Perception is inconstant. You should abandon desire-passion there.
sn22.139:1.7: “Fabrications are inconstant. You should abandon desire-passion there.
sn22.139:1.8: “Consciousness is inconstant. You should abandon desire-passion there.
sn22.139:1.9: “Monks, whatever is inconstant, you should abandon desire-passion there.”
